text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 168 

GAP_MOPP_COINS_3M 

LABEL: Gap Mail Order Preferred Pharmacy Coinsurance for 3-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 3-month supply of the drugs on 
this tier, using a mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_MOPP_COINS_3M 

TYPE: NUM
